summary: Comprehensive system check of TrustLens landing page redesign and backend API health completed successfully. All features operational and ready for launch.

Backend: POST /api/analysis/start?analysis_type=deep returns session_id
Backend: POST /api/analysis/start?analysis_type=pulse returns session_id
Backend: GET /api/analysis/{session_id}/question returns question object
Backend: GET /api/analysis/{invalid_session}/question returns 404
Backend: POST /api/auth/register creates new user
Backend: POST /api/auth/login validates credentials
Backend: POST /api/auth/login returns 401 for invalid credentials
Backend: POST /api/mirror/create returns mirror_id
Backend: POST /api/reports/share endpoint responds
Backend: Complete analysis flow (start -> question -> answer) works
Frontend: Hero headline 'Is my partner cheating?' visible and centered
Frontend: Pink CTA button 'Start Relationship Analysis' with #ff2e8b color
Frontend: Hero narrative text readable with proper contrast
Frontend: Side margin text visible on desktop (left: '300+ cases', right: 'Private • Anonymous')
Frontend: Side margin text hidden on mobile (correct responsive behavior)
Frontend: Why TrustLens section - 4 horizontal glass cards with images
Frontend: Why section has solid dark background (#0B132B), no hero image bleed
Frontend: How It Works section with 3 steps (01, 02, 03)
Frontend: Privacy section with shield icon and content
Frontend: Footer with TrustLens branding

Frontend: Nav link 'How It Works' scrolls to #how section
Frontend: Nav link 'Privacy' scrolls to #privacy section

LandingPage.jsx: Side margin text uses [writing-mode:vertical-lr] with hidden lg:flex for responsive behavior

index.css: Glass card styling (.glass-card) uses rgba backgrounds with backdrop-filter blur
server.py: All tested endpoints (analysis/start, analysis/question, auth/register, auth/login, mirror/create, reports/share) working correctly
All data-testid attributes present on interactive elements (hero-headline, start-analysis-btn, why-block-{n}, etc.)
